docket_entries.description: ORDER DISMISSED. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DAY, SYDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT KHLYBORA, SASHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SYDNEY DAY. DEFENDANT SASHA KHLYBORA DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF BRINGS A MALPRACTICE ACTION ARISING OUT OF HER 8/24/2017 TREATMENT AND THE STEPS DEFENDANT ALLEGEDLY TOOK TO REMEDY PROBLEMS WITH THE 8/24 TREATMENT. THIS CLAIM IS SUBJECT TO THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT, WHICH SQUARELY COVERS ALL MALPRACTICE CLAIMS REGARDLESS WHETHER THEY ARE WITHIN THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMITS OF THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED SEP-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KHLYBORA, SASHA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SYDNEY DAY. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT CONTESTED VENUE INDICATING JURISDICTIONAL CHALLENGE RATHER THAN VENUE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT ON 10/16/18 ORDERED DESTROYED.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00- FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, SYDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT KHLYBORA, SASHA
DECLARATION RE: RESPONSE TO LETTER RE CHALLENGE TO JURISDICTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, SYDNEY
